allow: Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n" "https://ads.tiktok.com/creative_radar_api/v1/popular_trend/product/list?period=7&page=1&limit=10&country_code=US" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" --max-time 30)

Bash(curl -s -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8" -H "Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9" --compressed "https://www.amazon.com/gp/movers-and-shakers" -o movers.html)
